task_completion.description: Save the document as safety_plan_formatted.docx without overwriting the original
task_completion.visual_evidence: The LibreOffice Writer window title bar should display 'safety_plan_formatted.docx'. The agent should have used 'Save As' to create this new file.

task_completion.description: Apply 'Heading 1' style to the 6 main section titles
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main section titles (e.g., '1. Purpose and Scope', '4. Job Hazard Analysis Matrix') should appear larger and bolder. The style dropdown in the toolbar should show 'Heading 1' when one of these titles is selected, or the Navigator pane should show them as top-level headings.

task_completion.description: Apply 'Heading 2' style to the 8 subsection titles
task_completion.visual_evidence: The subsection titles (e.g., '1.1 Applicability', '5.1 Evacuation Routes...') should be styled as subheadings. The style dropdown should show 'Heading 2' when selected, or they should appear nested under Heading 1 in the Navigator pane.

task_completion.description: Isolate '4. Job Hazard Analysis Matrix' into its own section and set to Landscape orientation
task_completion.visual_evidence: The page containing '4. Job Hazard Analysis Matrix' should be visibly wider than it is tall (Landscape), while the pages before and after it remain in Portrait orientation. This indicates successful use of 'Next Page' section breaks.

task_completion.description: Include page numbers in the footer of all sections
task_completion.visual_evidence: Page numbers should be visible at the bottom margin (footer area) of the document pages.

task_completion.description: Update all body text to 11pt Arial or Liberation Sans
task_completion.visual_evidence: When regular paragraph text (not headings) is selected or being edited, the font family dropdown in the toolbar should show 'Arial' or 'Liberation Sans' (or 'Helvetica') and the font size dropdown should show '11'.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the LibreOffice Writer GUI to format the document.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent clicking through LibreOffice Writer menus, style dropdowns, and page formatting dialogs.

integrity.description: The agent used actual styles and page breaks rather than manual visual approximations.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should use the 'Styles' menu for headings, 'Insert -> Page Break' or Page Style dialogs for landscape orientation, and 'Insert -> Page Number' for footers, rather than just manually changing font sizes, hitting 'Enter' repeatedly, or typing numbers at the bottom of pages.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a terminal script (e.g., python-docx) to bypass manual formatting.
integrity.visual_evidence: The trajectory should not show the agent writing and executing a Python script or bash command to directly manipulate the .docx file's XML/structure.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The source document is '/home/ga/Documents/safety_plan_raw.docx' and must be saved as '/home/ga/Documents/safety_plan_formatted.docx'. The document must have 6 specific 'Heading 1' titles (e.g., '1. Purpose and Scope', '4. Job Hazard Analysis Matrix') and 8 'Heading 2' titles (e.g., '1.1 Applicability'). Section 4 must be isolated with 'Next Page' breaks and set to Landscape orientation (resulting in at least 3 document sections). Page numbers must be in the footers. Body text must be 11pt Arial, Liberation Sans, or Helvetica.
